problem id: e810591c
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(5) XOR SHR(2)

examples:
  01111100 -> 10011111
  11111100 -> 10111111
  01101010 -> 01011010
  10000011 -> 01000000
  10011110 -> 11100111
  11101001 -> 00011010
  01010010 -> 01010100
  00110010 -> 01001100
  00011001 -> 00100110

query: 01011011
predicted answer: 01110110
